summary: Successfully tested all 5 checklist corrections requested. All features are working as expected: tab switching maintains scroll position, separate photo buttons are implemented, mobile warning displays correctly, global photo numbering works across all items, and auto-renumbering functions properly when photos are deleted.
passed_tests: Tab switching between rooms maintains scroll position (tested Sala→Cozinha→Banheiro)
Separate 'Escolher Arquivo' and 'Tirar Foto' buttons are present and correctly labeled
Mobile warning displays when 'Tirar Foto' is clicked on desktop: 'A função Tirar Foto está disponível apenas em dispositivos móveis'
Global photo numbering works correctly (FOTO 1, FOTO 2, FOTO 3 across all checklist items)
Auto-renumbering after photo deletion works (deleted first photo, remaining photo became FOTO 1)
Photo upload functionality works with proper base64 encoding
Room navigation preserves scroll position during all tab switches
All backend APIs functioning correctly (100% success rate)

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All 5 requested corrections implemented and tested
